risk_description: User who can create vendors and execute payments can create fictitious vendors and pay them.
User who enters invoices and runs payments can create and pay fraudulent invoices.
User who creates vendors and enters invoices can fabricate vendor relationships.
User who can post and reverse journal entries can manipulate financial records.
User who creates POs and receives goods can fabricate procurement transactions.
User who creates and approves POs bypasses purchasing authorization controls.
User who counts inventory and posts differences can conceal theft.
User who creates and confirms maintenance can fabricate work completion.
User who manages accounts and roles can grant unlimited system access.
User who maintains employee data and runs payroll can create ghost employees.
